intent: 实现 Fabric 知识流向观测层(dual sink):把'知识每一步人眼可见'落地。当前 stderr 人出口在 CC 上被 exit-0 抑制 → 死的;systemMessage 源码树零出现 → dual sink 是净新增。spec 锚=rev4.4-final.md(Goal A)。
goal: Goal A 观测核心落地:dual sink(client-adapter emitContext 三分支:CC/Codex=systemMessage人+additionalContext AI / Cursor 扁平降级)+ SessionStart banner 重构(人=分组普查/AI=scope=always正文+on-demand计数)+ 注入层 filterByActiveProject 镜像 + config 预设(nudge_mode/observe.*)+ PreToolUse命中gate + Stop value-gated软nudge + Codex matcher 加 apply_patch。终止=task_decomposition 全 done 且 W6 dogfood gate(CC 人能看到 banner systemMessage)过。

in_scope: C1: client-adapter emitContext 三分支(CC/Codex systemMessage+additionalContext camelCase嵌套 / Cursor 扁平 snake_case additional_context 人观测降级)
C2: SessionStart banner 重构(人=分组普查 always-loaded/on-demand/[team][personal]/剔他项目;AI=scope=always正文+on-demand类别计数,替换静态8-id;always正文 bounded by 现有 char budget+超额降级 summary)
C3: 注入层镜像 recall 的 filterByActiveProject(personal+team+project:当前,丢他项目)
C4: config 预设落地(nudge_mode silent|minimal|normal|verbose + observe.* per-event;不变量=nudge_mode只调人出口永不动AI出口;旧数值旋钮保留override)
C5: PreToolUse命中才出systemMessage/miss静默;C4改前未recall→AI-only;Stop archive nudge 软(additionalContext)+value-gated(仅archive-scan报高价值才emit)
C6: Codex hook matcher 显式加 apply_patch(Edit|Write|MultiEdit|apply_patch)
C7: 全测试绿 + 本地 pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit;dogfood 端到端实测 CC 上人能看到 banner systemMessage
out_of_scope: cite-policy-evict 退役 / fabric-hint contract DSL 瘦身(Goal B)
L0/L1/L2 + co-location 读侧 cutover(Goal B)
store 读写底层接线(已在 main 接线,不动)
constraints: Hook⊥MCP 边界:脚本不做语义/relevance 匹配(确定性信号归 hook,模糊意图归 AI recall);always 正文随 banner 是例外(本就该常驻)
改 shared schema 必须 pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build 重建 dist(memory: shared_rebuild_on_schema_change)
client-adapter never-throw 契约(KT-DEC-0007):每条路径静默降级不阻塞 host
源真值在 packages/cli/templates/hooks/;.claude/.codex/.cursor 安装副本由 fabric install 同步,严禁手编
每 wave 收口 git commit(中文提交信息)+ sha 回填 git_commits[];本地 tsc --noEmit 前置闸(memory: local_tsc_vs_ci_tsc)

git_commits.subject: feat(config): nudge_mode + observe.* 预设 + hook nudge-policy resolver
feat(hooks): client-adapter emitDualSink 三分支 dual sink
feat(server): always-active bodies + project-filter 守卫 (dual-sink 数据层)
feat(hooks): SessionStart banner dual-sink 重构 (人普查/AI always正文+计数)
feat(hooks): PreToolUse hit-gate + Stop archive 软 value-gated dual-sink
feat(hooks): Codex matcher 加 apply_patch + strip 集补齐 fabric-owned 全集
